description.value:
Requirements A creature within your reach is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Off-Guard] to you, and you are unnoticed by that creature.

When you attack from the shadows, your foes are thrown off balance. Make a melee Strike against the creature. If your Strike hits, the target remains @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Off-Guard] for the rest of your turn and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Clumsy]{Clumsy 1} (@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Clumsy]{Clumsy 2} on a critical hit) until the beginning of your next turn.
